yesterdayAnalysis: Rest day taken as planned after completing Ironman 70.3 Oregon on Saturday (July 19). The race delivered a total TSS of 365 across all disciplines with a 13.2mi run (TSS 212), 56mi bike (TSS 134), and 1.2mi swim (TSS 12). Post-race recovery day was appropriately scheduled given the substantial race effort.
todayRecommendation: Skip or significantly modify today's planned ROUVY bike + brick run + tri club run. You're only 48 hours post-race with sleep still recovering (score 76, up from 49 yesterday). weekProgress: Week 13 of 13 shows 459 TSS of 150 target (306% complete) — heavily inflated by Saturday's race effort. This is post-race recovery week leading into the October A-race (Ironman California), so the focus should be active recovery and sleep normalization rather than hitting traditional TSS targets. Monday's rest was appropriate.
keyInsight: You raced a 70.3 two days ago and are showing classic post-race sleep disruption (scores of 48, 49, 76 over three nights) — prioritize recovery over adherence to the planned training week.
